label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 10

extraction.one_line_summary: STORER Michael attacked solo from 31-rider breakaway on final category-2 climb while ROGLIČ Primož attacked GC group, crashed descending, gained 30 seconds.
tactical_patterns: STORER exploited sprint-averse break composition by attacking early on 10-12% ramps to avoid flat finish sprint.
ROGLIČ attacked GC group descending despite holding red jersey, prioritizing time gaps over race lead transfer.
High-quality 31-rider breaks can fracture on category-2 climbs when composition lacks pure climbers to police.
HAGE, MAS, LÓPEZ, KUSS trio organized chase while BERNAL and YATES couldn't contribute, revealing current form hierarchy.

rider_signals.STORER Michael: positive: Second stage win, comfortable soloing steep gradients from quality breakaway field.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: positive: Attacked GC rivals despite red jersey, gained 30s on BERNAL/YATES group even after descent crash.
rider_signals.EIKING Odd Christian: positive: Survived break fragmentation on category-2 climb to take red jersey, surprising GC resilience.
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Described as 'secondhand', unable to contribute to chase, lost 30s to ROGLIČ/MAS/LÓPEZ trio.
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: Not able to offer much in chase, lost time to ROGLIČ/HAGE/MAS/LÓPEZ group.
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: Led chase with LÓPEZ and HAGE, gained 30s on BERNAL/YATES, coordinated with ROGLIČ on finish.
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: positive: Part of trio that chased and gained time on BERNAL/YATES group.
rider_signals.HAIG Jack: positive: Matched MAS and LÓPEZ in chase, gained 30s on pre-race favorites BERNAL and YATES.
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Drove chase with GC hopefuls, gained time on BERNAL despite domestique role.
rider_signals.MARTIN Guillaume: negative: Started to fade on final climb despite being in 31-rider quality breakaway.
